zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Stewart 3rd of Garlies and Dalswinton於1443年出生在蘇格蘭維托史爾加利艾斯頓時，他的父親William Stewart 2nd of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto35歲，母親Elizabeth Arnot33歲。他和Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於大約1500年在他的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭維托史爾加利艾斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Stewart 3rd of Garlies and Dalswinton于1443年出生在苏格兰維托史爾加利艾斯頓时，他的父亲William Stewart 2nd of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto35岁，母亲Elizabeth Arnot33岁。他和Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于大约1500年在他的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰維托史爾加利艾斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Stewart 3rd of Garlies and Dalswinton was born in 1443, in Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland, his father, William Stewart 2nd of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto, was 35 and his mother, Elizabeth Arnot, was 33. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers. He died about 1500, in his hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.Traquhair, Peeblesshire, Scotland: Traquair, Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Stewart 3rd of Garlies and Dalswinton est né en 1443, à Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Écosse, son père, William Stewart 2nd of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Arnot, avait 33 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers. Il est décédé environ 1500, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Stewart 3rd of Garlies and Dalswinton 1443 in Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Stewart 2nd of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto 35 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Arnot 33. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1500 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Stewart 3rd of Garlies and Dalswinton è nato il nel 1443 nel Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William Stewart 2nd of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Arnot, aveva 33 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers. Morì circa 1500, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Stewart 3rd of Garlies and Dalswintonが1443年にスコットランドウィグトウンシュアイアガーリーストンで生まれた時，父William Stewart 2nd of Dalswinton, Garlies and Mintoは35歳，母Elizabeth Arnotは33歳であった。彼はElizabeth Douglas of Caversとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1500年に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドウィグトウンシュアイアガーリーストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Stewart 3rd of Garlies and Dalswinton(이)가 1443년 스컷랜드 위그타운실르 가리스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Stewart 2nd of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Arnot(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1500년 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 위그타운실르 가리스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Stewart 3rd of Garlies and Dalswinton nasceu em 1443, em Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland, seu pai, William Stewart 2nd of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Arnot, tinha 33 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1500, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Stewart 3rd of Garlies and Dalswinton родился в 1443 г. в местности гарлиестон, вигтоуншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Stewart 2nd of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Arnot, 33. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers. Он умер около 1500 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности гарлиестон, вигтоуншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Stewart 3rd of Garlies and Dalswinton nació en 1443, en Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland, su papá, William Stewart 2nd of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Arnot, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers. Murió aproximadamente 1500, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
